notableEvents.label: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jackson Chourio.

notableEvents.label: Jackson Chourio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio grounds out, second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas.

notableEvents.label: Joey Ortiz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joey Ortiz grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Cooper Pratt out at 2nd. Joey Ortiz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jackson Chourio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio homers (13) on a fly ball to left center field.
